description_long: This house is a modern, low-profile residential building with a flat roof and a sprawling, horizontal layout. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with large window openings and a mix of solid and glazed wall sections. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, and the property is surrounded by a landscaped area featuring numerous snow-covered evergreen trees. A long driveway or road leads up to the main entrance, which is centrally located and flanked by additional building wings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a horizontal layout, large windows, and light exterior, surrounded by snowy evergreens and a long driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central driveway, and symmetrical arrangement of trees leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, multiple wings, and the dense cluster of trees on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house, more visible windows, and a row of trees forming a natural boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway extending to the left and the house's segmented layout with adjacent trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass sections
attribute_entryway_design: Central main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a direct driveway approach, flanked by minimalistic landscaping.
